title: cacalia pulverulenta
intro: Cacalia pulverulenta, also known as powdered cacalia or powdered sweet cicely, is a perennial herb in the sunflower family that is native to China. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion and bloating. The health benefits of Cacalia pulverulenta include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve gut health, making it a popular ingredient in traditional Chinese medicine. Cacalia pulverulenta can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried powder, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
